description_long: This is a robust sledgehammer with a thick, rectangular black metal head and a solid, straight wooden handle. The head is wide and flat on both striking faces, designed for delivering powerful blows, and features the word 'Hammer' printed in white on one side. The handle is cylindrical, smooth, and made of light-colored wood, providing a comfortable grip for two-handed use. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with no visible fasteners or joints. The hammer appears clean and well-crafted, with no visible signs of wear or damage. Its overall design is utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty tasks in urban construction or maintenance settings.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a black rectangular metal head and a straight, light wooden handle. The head is labeled 'Hammer' and both handle and head appear pristine and robust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat face of the black metal head with 'Hammer' printed on it and the full length of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical shape of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the opposite flat face of the hammer head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile of the head and the handle's curvature.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, cylindrical, smooth, light-colored, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head, black metal, dual flat striking faces, no claws or peens
